headline: Jon Hamm Thriller 'American Hostage' Scores Global Streaming Blitz
lede: Sony Pictures Television is catapulting MGM+'s psychological drama 'American Hostage' into international markets, securing prime real estate on multiple streaming platforms.
body:
MGM+ is preparing for a major international rollout of its high-profile psychological thriller, strategically positioning the Jon Hamm-led series across key global streaming territories.

The series, developed by acclaimed showrunners Shawn Ryan and Eileen Myers, has already secured distribution deals with heavyweight platforms including HBO Max, Movistar Plus+, and Stan. Sony Pictures Television is orchestrating the international expansion, targeting markets in the UK, Germany, Spain, Italy, Belgium, the Netherlands, and Latin America.

Industry observers note the series represents a significant bet on Hamm's dramatic gravitas, following his acclaimed turns in prestige television. The psychological thriller format continues to draw robust international interest, with streamers increasingly hungry for taut, character-driven narratives.

While specific plot details remain under wraps, the series is expected to leverage Hamm's proven ability to inhabit complex, morally nuanced characters. His track record with critically acclaimed series like 'Mad Men' suggests 'American Hostage' will deliver sophisticated psychological tension.
key_facts: Jon Hamm stars in psychological thriller
Developed by Shawn Ryan and Eileen Myers
